episodes.title: I’M REASONABLE- CULT MENTALITY & DISTURBING DOCUMENTARIES | KEVIN HART RESPONDS TO ROAST BACKLASH
episodes.description:
In this bonus episode of the I'm Reasonable Podcast, comedian Zainab Johnson dives into the psychology of cults, internet manipulation, celebrity influence, and the growing backlash surrounding comedy culture.
The conversation explores the disturbing revelations featured in the Keep Sweet: Pray and Obey documentary, the viral Nature Boy Documentary story, and the broader fascination with modern cult leaders and groupthink.

The episode also examines Kevin Hart’s recent appearance on The Breakfast Club, where he addressed criticism surrounding The Roast of Kevin Hart and defended the boundaries of roast comedy amid online backlash. Discussions surrounding controversial jokes, audience accountability, and freedom in comedy have continued across podcasts and social media following the roast controversy.

Expect comedy, honesty, sharp commentary, and unfiltered reactions only Zainab Johnson can deliver.

Subscribe for more weekly episodes of I’m Reasonable with Zainab Johnson.
